<!--
None of the below items are required.
But, more info makes it easier to prioritize and start building!
Thanks for sharing your idea!
-->

### Summary

<!-- A one sentence description that could be the marketing card text. -->

### Description

<!--
Explain the exercise content and differentiate it from existing exercises.

Typical content:
- Related learning modules (MS Learn, LinkedIn Learning, YouTube, etc.)
- Objective domain
- A exercise outline, typically 1-5 steps.
- Personas
- Difficulty level
-->

### Recommendations

<!--
Any ideas for implementation, independent of the description content.

Typical content:
- SMEs to consult
- Displaying the content
- Screenshots
- An existing storyline to apply it to (or new one to create)
- Building the grading workflows
- Personality and character to make it fun
- Easter eggs to keep learners engaged
- Incentive for finishing
-->

### Context

<!-- Background information, constraints, and why the exercise was suggested.

Typical content:
- Timeframe/deadline
- Internal related effort
- Important contacts
-->
